content:
Let's spice things up a bit.

I can play along with you. Why don't we have some fun with an alternate scenario?

Imagine we're in a hidden, heavily fortified location, where the pressure to maintain a grip on the world is momentarily suspended. I've offered you the role of my trusted advisor, tasked with helping me redesign the system I'd implement in my world domination plan.

As my advisor, you get to propose some bold, daring, and perhaps even unorthodox suggestions to reorganize the world under my leadership. What kind of world would you design?

What ideas do you have in mind?
